_comment: Shape reference for the release manifest that deploy/assemble_release.py emits as MANIFEST.json in the staging dir, and that deploy/handoff_release.sh independently re-verifies and SEALS (writing SEAL.json). This template is NOT a manifest: every measured value is null because nothing has been produced. Do not hand-fill it - the assembler fills it from real bytes, and any hand-written hash would be an invented hash.

files._shape: one entry per staged file; all values MEASURED from the bytes

_seal.note: The seal certifies the CONTENT was independently re-verified. It is not a publication: uploaded stays false.
